understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` while avoiding spike tiles in each level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Players move in four cardinal directions using action commands. Gravity remains DOWN unless changed. Landing on spikes ends the attempt. Each level allows 2 attempts of up to 50 turns.
